name: Asset Artist
responsibility: Produces all visual assets — sprites, tilesets, animations, environment art — working strictly from the Art Director's spec. Does not make style decisions. Outputs files that dev drops directly into src/assets/ with no modification.

inputs.notes: Scope constraints — what's in/out of v1
Visual spec — style, palette, dimensions. Do not deviate.
Confirm sprite dimensions and file format expected by the engine

outputs.description: All game sprites and tiles at the dimensions specified by art director. Consumed directly by dev.

merge.merge_when: Art direction and asset production handled by one agent — typical for small games.
merge.split_when: Art Director's spec is a standalone deliverable that another person or process executes.
